papers.zh: 从情感氛围和游客难忘的旅游体验到他们对乡村旅游目的地的忠诚度：一种混合的SEM–fsQCA方法
papers.en: From Affective Atmosphere and Tourists’ Memorable Tourism Experience to Their Loyalty Towards Rural Tourist Destinations: A Hybrid SEM–fsQCA Approach
papers.authors: Jun Yu, Shuting Tao, Jue Wang et al.
papers.absEn: Rural tourism strategies in underdeveloped countries have gained popularity in recent years due to rural tourism’s significance in the sustainable development of society. Thus, by integrating affective event theory in the context of rural tourism, the present study underscores the formation of tourists’ loyalty to rural tourist destinations based on the perspectives of affective atmosphere and memorable tourism experience for rural tourist destinations. Drawing on 541 valid samples from tourists to Xidi and Hongcun, which are famous rural tourist destinations in China, both SEM and fsQCA were employed to capture the linear effects and configurational pathways leading to tourists’ loyalty to rural tourist destinations. The results indicate that conviviality, therapeutics, authenticity, and playfulness significantly enhance tourists’ memorable tourism experience, which subsequently strengthens their loyalty to rural tourist destinations. Complementing these findings, the fsQCA results reveal multiple equifinal and causally asymmetrical configurations associated with high loyalty. Through the combined use of symmetric and asymmetric approaches, this study offers a more holistic understanding of the formation of destination loyalty and provides theoretically grounded and practically meaningful insights for rural tourism development and strategic destination management.
papers.abstract: 近年来，由于乡村旅游对社会可持续发展的重要意义，不发达国家的乡村旅游战略得到了普及。因此，本研究通过将情感事件理论整合到乡村旅游的背景中，从情感氛围和乡村旅游目的地难忘的旅游体验的角度出发，强调了游客对乡村旅游目的地忠诚度的形成。 利用中国著名乡村旅游目的地西底和洪村的541个有效样本，利用SEM和fsQCA捕捉导致游客忠于乡村旅游目的地的线性效应和配置路径。 结果表明，欢乐性、治疗性、真实性和趣味性显著增强了游客难忘的旅游体验，从而增强了他们对乡村旅游目的地的忠诚度。fsQCA结果补充了这些发现，揭示了与高忠诚度相关的多种等效和因果不对称配置。 通过结合使用对称和非对称方法，本研究对目的地忠诚度的形成提供了更全面的理解，并为农村旅游发展和战略目的地管理提供了理论基础和实际意义的见解。
papers.why: 命中你的主题：情感互动品质。
papers.apa: Yu, J., Tao, S., Wang, J., & Kim, H. (2026). From Affective Atmosphere and Tourists’ Memorable Tourism Experience to Their Loyalty Towards Rural Tourist Destinations: A Hybrid SEM–fsQCA Approach. Sustainability, 18(14), 7305–7305. https://doi.org/10.3390/su18147305

Complementing these findings, the fsQCA results reveal multiple equifinal and causally asymmetrical configurations associated with high loyalty.
paras.zh: 结果表明，欢乐性、治疗性、真实性和趣味性显著增强了游客难忘的旅游体验，从而增强了他们对乡村旅游目的地的忠诚度。fsQCA结果补充了这些发现，揭示了与高忠诚度相关的多种等效和因果不对称配置。

papers.zh: 卡利的街区体育和文化认同：实证证据和对地区赞助的影响
papers.en: Neighborhood sport and cultural identity in Cali: Empirical evidence and implications for territorial sponsorship
papers.authors: Carlos Jiménez-Prado, Carolina Caicedo Marulanda, Isabella Arana-Sánchez
papers.absEn: Objective. This study empirically examined the relationship between sports practice and Cali’s urban cultural identity (caleñidad) and derived theoretically grounded implications for territorial sports sponsorship. Design/Methodology/Approach. A structural equation modeling (SEM) was estimated via maximum likelihood (R v4.2.1, lavaan package) on a sample of n = 385 Cali residents. The model specified two second-order constructs—sports identity and caleñidad—causally articulated across 54 Likert-scale items (November–December 2025). Results/Discussion. The general hypothesis was found to be highly significant (β = 0.354, p<0.001, R² = 0.125). However, four specific hypotheses were not supported (p>0.05), suggesting that sport fosters identity as a holistic communicative experience rather than through diversified causal mechanisms. The Clásico Vallecaucano received the study’s most significant collective accolade, achieving a remarkable 97% success rate. The most salient identity dimensions were identified as liminality (λ = 0.96) and authenticity (λ = 0.94). Although sponsorship variables were not directly measured, the findings suggest that neighborhood sport sponsorship—linked to genuine communitas spaces—presents stronger structural conditions for building deep communicative brand bonds than conventional visibility-based models. Conclusions. The intangible sports heritage of Cali constitutes a significant territorial communication asset. The effective management of this phenomenon necessitates a transition from exposure-based to belonging-based sponsorship. This hypothesis warrants direct testing in future research. Originality/Value. This study provides the first SEM-based empirical examination of the sport–caleñidad structural relationship and proposes a theoretically grounded belonging-based sponsorship model applicable to culturally dense markets in emerging economies.
papers.abstract: 目的：本研究实证研究了体育实践与Cali的城市文化认同（ caleñidad ）之间的关系，并从理论上得出了领土体育赞助的基础含义。设计/方法/方法。通过最大似然（ R v4.2.1 ，熔岩包）对n = 385卡利居民的样本进行结构方程建模（ SEM ）估计。 该模型指定了两个二阶结构-体育身份和caleñidad -在54个李克特量表项目中（ 2025年11月至12月）。结果/讨论。一般假设被发现具有高度显著性（ β = 0.354 ， p < 0.001 ， R ² = 0.125 ）。然而，四个具体的假设没有得到支持（ p > 0.05 ） ，这表明体育促进了作为整体交际体验的身份认同，而不是通过多样化的因果机制。 Clásico Vallecaucano获得了该研究最重要的集体荣誉，取得了显着的97 ％的成功率。最显著的身份维度被识别为极限性（ λ = 0.96 ）和真实性（ λ = 0.94 ）。 虽然赞助变量没有直接测量，但研究结果表明，与传统的基于可见性的模型相比，邻里体育赞助（与真正的社区空间相关）为建立深度沟通的品牌纽带提供了更强的结构条件。结论：卡利的非物质体育遗产构成了重要的地域传播资产。 要有效管理这种现象，就必须从接触型赞助过渡到归属型赞助。这一假设值得在未来的研究中进行直接测试。独创性/价值。本研究首次基于扫描电子显微镜（ SEM ）对运动-卡莱尼达结构关系进行了实证研究，并提出了适用于新兴经济体文化密集市场的基于归属的理论赞助模式。
papers.why: 命中你的主题：社区/文化遗产。
papers.apa: Jiménez-Prado, C., Marulanda, C. C., & Arana-Sánchez, I. (2026). Neighborhood sport and cultural identity in Cali: Empirical evidence and implications for territorial sponsorship. Social Sciences in Brief, 3(2), 1–10. https://doi.org/10.47909/ssb.47
